title: Giant Amorphous Bantha Breakfast Biscuit
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Bantha}}
[[File:GiantAmorphBantha.jpg|thumb|right|A Giant Amorphous Bantha Breakfast Biscuit]]
'''Giant Amorphous Bantha Breakfast Biscuits''' were amoeboid creatures created when a [[Tagge Company/Legends|TaggeCo]] chef placed a new form of cuisine, [[Bantha Breakfast Biscuit]]s into an [[autochef]]. The [[Biscuit Baron]] preservatives bonded with the [[Bantha/Legends|bantha]] genetic material in the meat to create this creature, which promptly consumed the chef. After this incident, TaggeCo restricted shipping of Bantha Breakfast Biscuits to various [[Planet/Legends|planets]] which they claimed were "inadequately prepared to delight in this yummy breakfast delicacy."

The Giant Amorphous Bantha Breakfast Biscuits could also mutate in other conditions, such as when the preservatives came into contact with stale ship air and certain environmental conditions. This is what happened to the natives on the planet [[Gastrula]].

Giant Amorphous Bantha Breakfast Biscuits were considered for use in biological warfare by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

The only known way to destroy one of these creatures was by using [[blue sauce]], a popular condiment served with Bantha Breakfast Biscuits.

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|11|Bungo n' Rusti Get Carry-Out}} {{1st}}
